title: A-Share Feature Monitoring
description: Real-time feature pipeline monitoring: computation cost, symbol counts, null/inf stats, abandon events, feature statistics, and validation results.

list.name: trade_date
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT trade_date FROM bar_metrics ORDER BY trade_date DESC
list.label: Trade Date

panels.title: 计算耗时趋势
panels.description: 每个 bar 的特征计算耗时（秒），黄色/红色阈值线分别为 55s 和 58s

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT trade_date || 'T' || bar_time || '+08:00' AS time, cost_seconds FROM bar_metrics WHERE trade_date = '${trade_date}' ORDER BY bar_time
targets.queryText: SELECT trade_date || 'T' || bar_time || '+08:00' AS time, cost_seconds FROM bar_metrics WHERE trade_date = '${trade_date}' ORDER BY bar_time

panels.title: 标的数量
panels.description: 每个 bar 参与计算的股票数量

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT trade_date || 'T' || bar_time || '+08:00' AS time, n_symbols FROM bar_metrics WHERE trade_date = '${trade_date}' ORDER BY bar_time
targets.queryText: SELECT trade_date || 'T' || bar_time || '+08:00' AS time, n_symbols FROM bar_metrics WHERE trade_date = '${trade_date}' ORDER BY bar_time

panels.title: Null / Inf 统计
panels.description: 每个 bar 中全部特征列的 Null 和 Inf 单元格总数

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT trade_date || 'T' || bar_time || '+08:00' AS time, n_null_cells AS 'Null Cells', n_inf_cells AS 'Inf Cells' FROM bar_metrics WHERE trade_date = '${trade_date}' ORDER BY bar_time
targets.queryText: SELECT trade_date || 'T' || bar_time || '+08:00' AS time, n_null_cells AS 'Null Cells', n_inf_cells AS 'Inf Cells' FROM bar_metrics WHERE trade_date = '${trade_date}' ORDER BY bar_time

panels.title: 重试次数
panels.description: 每个 bar 拉取数据的重试次数

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT trade_date || 'T' || bar_time || '+08:00' AS time, retry_count FROM bar_metrics WHERE trade_date = '${trade_date}' ORDER BY bar_time
targets.queryText: SELECT trade_date || 'T' || bar_time || '+08:00' AS time, retry_count FROM bar_metrics WHERE trade_date = '${trade_date}' ORDER BY bar_time

panels.title: 放弃事件表
panels.description: 因重试耗尽而放弃的 bar 详情

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT bar_time, retry_count AS retries, reason, created_at FROM abandon_events WHERE trade_date = '${trade_date}' ORDER BY bar_time
targets.queryText: SELECT bar_time, retry_count AS retries, reason, created_at FROM abandon_events WHERE trade_date = '${trade_date}' ORDER BY bar_time

panels.title: 放弃计数
panels.description: 当日放弃 bar 总数

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS abandon_count FROM abandon_events WHERE trade_date = '${trade_date}'
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS abandon_count FROM abandon_events WHERE trade_date = '${trade_date}'

panels.title: 关键特征均值
panels.description: tracked features 的 mean_val 时序（按 feature_name 分组）

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT trade_date || 'T' || bar_time || '+08:00' AS time, mean_val, feature_name FROM feature_stats WHERE trade_date = '${trade_date}' ORDER BY bar_time
targets.queryText: SELECT trade_date || 'T' || bar_time || '+08:00' AS time, mean_val, feature_name FROM feature_stats WHERE trade_date = '${trade_date}' ORDER BY bar_time

panels.title: 特征 Inf 计数
panels.description: 各 tracked feature 当日 Inf 总量

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT feature_name, SUM(inf_count) AS total_inf FROM feature_stats WHERE trade_date = '${trade_date}' GROUP BY feature_name ORDER BY total_inf DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT feature_name, SUM(inf_count) AS total_inf FROM feature_stats WHERE trade_date = '${trade_date}' GROUP BY feature_name ORDER BY total_inf DESC

panels.title: 一致性概览
panels.description: 离线 vs 实时 mean_equal_ratio（越接近 1 越好）

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT mean_equal_ratio FROM validation_summary WHERE trade_date = '${trade_date}'
targets.queryText: SELECT mean_equal_ratio FROM validation_summary WHERE trade_date = '${trade_date}'

panels.title: 一致性详情
panels.description: 每个特征的离线/实时一致性指标，按 equal_ratio 升序排列（最差的在上面）

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT feature_name, equal_ratio, max_abs_diff, correlation, CASE WHEN is_known_divergent = 1 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS known_divergent FROM validation_columns WHERE trade_date = '${trade_date}' ORDER BY equal_ratio ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT feature_name, equal_ratio, max_abs_diff, correlation, CASE WHEN is_known_divergent = 1 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS known_divergent FROM validation_columns WHERE trade_date = '${trade_date}' ORDER BY equal_ratio ASC
